text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I lost... Even though I said it'd never happen
again!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hey, do ya think I'm... that I'm underestimatin'
this racin' stuff?
choice_data_list: We don't have time to mope!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. Quittin' now would spare me the blues,
but I'd lose out on the thrill of gettin' wins, too.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know winnin' isn't easy. That's why I'm willin' to
put in the work. I can't be gettin' all upset over a
couple losses!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So thanks! I'm feelin' better already, and startin'
tomorrow, I'll be right back to runnin' with my all!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...You're right there. No amount of whinin's gonna
make me faster.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right! No more mopin'. Let's get back and get
trainin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna work real hard 'n win the next one for
real!
